metadata.description: Expanded training prompts for T2I-RL compositional generation (aligned with T2I-CompBench, TIFA, GenEval benchmarks)
metadata.changelog: v4.0: core compositional categories expanded to 100 prompts each (aligned with benchmark evaluation dimensions). styles/actions/nature_scenes/urban_scenes kept at 40.
